research_directions.name: Agentic RAG
research_directions.meaning: Retrieval is planned and controlled by an agent, not a one-shot vector lookup.
research_directions.maomiai_action: Add a context router and planning step before retrieval.

research_directions.name: GraphRAG / Graph Memory
research_directions.meaning: Use graph-structured knowledge for multi-hop reasoning and code or service relationships.

research_directions.name: MCP Gateway
research_directions.meaning: Expose tools and enterprise systems through a standardized protocol.
research_directions.maomiai_action: Add an MCP-style tool gateway for GitHub, files, web, weather, and video generation.

research_directions.name: Cache-Augmented Generation
research_directions.meaning: Cache stable context and repeated evidence instead of retrieving everything each time.
research_directions.maomiai_action: Cache model catalog, repo summaries, and common project facts.

research_directions.name: Codebase Memory
research_directions.meaning: Use AST, Tree-Sitter, or graph indexing for codebase understanding.
research_directions.maomiai_action: Add a Tree-Sitter repo graph for code and service analysis.

research_directions.name: No-Hallucination Policy
research_directions.meaning: Force tools for real-time facts and local memory for project facts.
research_directions.maomiai_action: Block unsupported claims and require evidence.
